title: Create Opportunity Record Types for Online and Enterprise Sales
description:
## Context

Different types of sales opportunities need distinct configurations in Salesforce to reflect their different sales processes.

## Record Types

### Online
For software subscriptions and self-service purchases. Uses a streamlined sales process.

### Enterprise
For formal sales cycles with traditional opportunity stages. Uses the default Salesforce stage progression.

## Implementation

Each record type requires a corresponding Sales Process in Salesforce. Two sales processes were created, and two record types were configured on the Opportunity object. Implemented on the sandbox first.
acceptance_criteria: Two record types exist on the Opportunity object: Online and Enterprise
Online record type is configured for software/subscription/self-service opportunities
Enterprise record type uses the default opportunity stages for formal sales cycles
Corresponding sales processes are created for each record type
Record types are functional in the sandbox and ready for production deployment
data_model_changes: Two new Opportunity record types (Online and Enterprise) with corresponding Sales Processes configured in Salesforce. Online is for self-service subscriptions; Enterprise is for formal sales cycles.
implementation_notes: Salesforce requires a Sales Process to be created before a Record Type can be associated with it. Both were set up on the sandbox first. The Online record type is used by the automated opportunity creation flow (MBT-1029).
comment_summary: Developer added both record types and sales processes on the sandbox, confirmed with screenshots. Product owner expressed excitement about importing accounts and opportunities to visualize the consulting pipeline.
